raw_source.title: [远程 Remote] MegaETH 诚招 Senior DevOps Engineer 高级运维工程师(专家）_薪资可谈
raw_source.body:
## About
We are a global engineering team building the next-generation, high-performance Layer-2 with real-time execution and full Ethereum compatibility.

* Raised a $20M seed round led by Dragonfly and supported by top industry backers including Vitalik Buterin
* Subsequent public offering attracted over $450M in commitments, drawing significant global attention
* Core team members come from top universities and leading blockchain companies, with deep technical expertise
* Led by senior executives with extensive Web3 industry experience
* Globally distributed team with a fully remote work environment
* Ideal for engineers passionate about high-performance blockchain systems, core infrastructure, and low-latency distributed architectures.

If you're seeking impactful opportunities and bring strong fundamentals along with deep hands-on experience, we’d love to have you join us.

## Responsibilities
• Infrastructure Ownership: Design, implement, and manage secure, highly available, and
scalable infrastructure for blockchain nodes, sequencers, and related services.
• Automation & Tooling: Develop CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure-as-code (IaC), and
monitoring systems to ensure seamless deployments and minimal downtime.
• Observability & Reliability: Build dashboards, alerts, and on-call systems to detect issues
proactively and reduce mean time to recovery (MTTR).
• Security & Compliance: Apply best practices for key management, secrets management,
and infrastructure hardening to protect network integrity.
• Performance & Scaling: Continuously optimize infrastructure for latency, throughput, and
cost efficiency across multiple environments (testnets, mainnet, staging).
• Collaboration: Work closely with blockchain engineers, protocol researchers, and SREs to
support new feature rollouts and network upgrades.
• Incident Response: Lead troubleshooting during production incidents and post-mortem
reviews, with a focus on prevention and continuous improvement.

## Requirements
• 5+ years of DevOps, SRE, or Infrastructure Engineering experience.
• Strong background with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) and container orchestration
(Kubernetes, Docker).
• Hands-on experience with Infrastructure-as-Code (Terraform, Ansible, Helm, Pulumi, etc.).
• Deep understanding of CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, ArgoCD, etc.).
• Strong Linux systems administration, networking, and troubleshooting skills.
• Proficiency in at least one scripting/programming language (e.g., Bash, Python, Go, Rust).
• Familiarity with monitoring and logging stacks (Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, ELK,
OpenTelemetry).

## Nice to Haves
• Previous experience running blockchain infrastructure (Ethereum nodes, validators,
sequencers, or similar).
• Understanding of EVM and blockchain scaling technologies.
• Exposure to distributed databases, consensus protocols, or high-throughput systems.
• Contributions to open-source DevOps, blockchain, or infrastructure tooling projects.
• Experience with security audits, penetration testing, or compliance frameworks.

## Job Nature

- Full-time or not: Full-Time
- Remote or not: Remote

## Salary and Benefits
Salary Negotiable. We hire top talents.

## Contact
TG: @Aolispace
WeChat: xiuxiuamber

comments.body: 欢迎您提交招聘信息，Rebase 会整理招聘内容，通过公众号发出。
comments.author: github-actions[bot]

raw_source.author: Aolispace-gb
